summary: Iteration 29: Tested Partner Step Completion features. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: Partner Dashboard tabs, user detail overlay, 'Ihr Schritt/Your Step' label, step completion buttons, next step activation, and user dashboard progress update.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

BACKEND: digiFORT partner login successful
BACKEND: HC&S partner login successful
BACKEND: Hausarztpraxis partner login successful (linked via linked_user_ids)
BACKEND: Partner can get submissions
BACKEND: Partner can view user detail via submission
BACKEND: partner_step_id returned correctly (matching partner tag to step filter_tag)
BACKEND: Partner can complete a step - status becomes 'completed'
BACKEND: completed_at timestamp is set when partner completes a step
BACKEND: Next step automatically activated to 'in_progress' after partner completes current step
BACKEND: Progress history records partner email as changed_by

BACKEND: Dr. Kumar progress verified (3/8 steps)
BACKEND: Partner can access user via linked_user_ids

BACKEND: Steps with email_on_leave=true verified (Steps 1, 3, 6)

seed_data_creation: Test modified Dr. Maria Silva's progress (completed FaMed step, activated Service Kenntnisprüfung)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 complete. Partner step completion feature fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) Partner can view user detail via submission OR linked_user_ids, 2) partner_step_id correctly identifies the step matching partner's tag, 3) Completing a step sets completed_at timestamp and activates next step to in_progress, 4) Progress history records changed_by with partner email, 5) Email sent only when step has email_on_leave=true (Steps 1, 3, 6). Dr. Silva's progress was modified during testing (now at 50%, step 5 in_progress). All 17 partners working correctly with their respective categories (Antragstellung, Kenntnisprüfung, Weiterbildung, Praxis).

features_verified.frontend_freigeben_abschliessen_buttons: PASS (shows 'Approve' for partner step, 'Complete' for others)
